title: quadlet tests: skip on RHEL8 rootless
body:
skip in setup() if journald unavailable.

To be pedantic, this is overkill: some quadlet tests pass because they don't run journald. Too bad.

Also skip a play-kube test that requires journal

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Cherry-pick of #17872 with a little extra because of conflicts
@containers/podman-maintainers this will address some (sigh, not all) gating-test failures in RHEL
